metadata.title: 11th Pass Debug Factorial — Failed Conditions Only
metadata.priority: P0 — validates infrastructure fixes from pre-run-fixes.xml
metadata.approach: Run ONLY the conditions that failed in passes 9-10. Do NOT re-run DynUNet or MambaVesselNet (20/20 succeeded). Focus on SAM3 + zero-shot + artifact upload.

previous-pass-results.model: All conditions passed. No re-run needed. NOTE: Checkpoints were LOST due to 413 (saved only via file_mounts workaround). The 11th pass MUST verify DynUNet checkpoints land in GCS via MLflow.
All conditions passed. No re-run needed. Same checkpoint loss caveat as DynUNet.

All 20 attempts FAILED. Root causes: (a) OOM in check_gradient_flow() — fixed by skip_gradient_flow when gradient_checkpointing=true (b) Spot preemption exhaustion (3 recoveries, then FAILED) (c) 80% preemption rate on L4 spot in europe-west4
10th pass: job #154 ran 12+ hours. Training completed in 5 min but post-training subflow + spot preemption + 413 = 12h.
3 attempts, all FAILED_SETUP. Likely HF download or DVC pull issues.

what-changed-since-10th-pass.change: 10th pass double-check: 67 new tests (NaN guards, OOM diagnostics, etc.)
11th pass pre-run fixes: MLflow GCS deployment, Docker rebuild, file_mounts removal

phase.name: Infrastructure Validation — 3 Focused Jobs
phase.description: Before running any factorial conditions, validate the infrastructure fixes with 3 carefully chosen test jobs. Each tests a different code path. Use ON-DEMAND for SAM3 (no spot preemption during validation).

verification.criterion: MLflow UI shows run with metrics and artifacts

job.name: sam3_hybrid-cbdice_cldice-calibfalse-f0
job.note: ON-DEMAND — no spot preemption during validation. ~$0.35/hr × 0.5h = ~$0.18

verification.criterion: NaN guard fires on cbdice_cldice init (expected, not a bug)
~900 MB checkpoint uploads to GCS without 413

phase.gate: ALL 3 jobs must succeed before proceeding to Phase 2. If ANY job fails, diagnose and fix BEFORE launching the factorial. Do NOT "just retry" — understand the failure.

phase.name: Failed Factorial Conditions
phase.description:
Run the conditions that failed in previous passes. DynUNet and MambaVesselNet are EXCLUDED (20/20 succeeded). Only SAM3 variants + zero-shot baselines.
Use ON-DEMAND for SAM3 (spot had 80% preemption rate, economically irrational). Use SPOT for zero-shot baselines (short jobs, preemption recoverable).

cost-estimate.note: Compared to 10th pass: $23.30 wasted with zero useful output

monitoring.duration-alarm: SAM3 jobs: WARN at 45 min, CANCEL at 90 min Zero-shot jobs: WARN at 30 min, CANCEL at 60 min
monitoring.kill-switch: 3+ identical failures within 5 min → cancel all same-config jobs

phase.name: Re-verify Previously Succeeded Conditions
phase.description: DynUNet and MambaVesselNet succeeded in training but LOST checkpoints due to 413. After the GCS fix, we need to verify that ARTIFACT UPLOAD works for these models. We do NOT need to re-train — just re-run 1 condition each to verify the upload path.
phase.note: If Phase 1 J1 (DynUNet) already verified artifact upload, Phase 3 can be skipped for DynUNet. Only run MambaVesselNet verification.

success-criteria.criterion: ZERO "413" or "Request Entity Too Large" in any job log
MLflow UI shows all runs with metrics and artifacts
